title: bossiaea rhombifolia
intro: Bossiaea rhombifolia, also known as the rounded bossiaea, is a plant species native to Western Australia. It is a shrub-like plant with medicinal properties, traditionally used by the Indigenous Australians to treat various health conditions. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which provide health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, and protecting against infections. Bossiaea rhombifolia can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and its leaves and roots can also be used to make a tincture, allowing for the extraction of its medicinal properties.
